revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{#switch:{{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes |User |{{NAMESPACE}} }} |User |Wikipedia talk |User talk={{ombox |subst = {{subst:substcheck}} |type = notice |image = [[File:Under construction icon-blue.svg|none|50px|link=]] |text = '''This is not a Wikipedia {{{article|article}}}''': It is an individual user's '''work-in-progress''' page, and may be incomplete and/or unreliable.{{#if:{{{page|}}} |{{space}}The current/final version of this {{#if:{{{article|}}}|page|article}} may be located at [[{{{page}}}]] now or in the future.}}{{#if:{{{newuser|}}}{{{noob|}}}{{{help|}}} | |{{space}}For guidance on developing this draft, see [[Wikipedia:So you made a userspace draft]]. }}{{nbsp}}{{{extra|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{help|}}}|no||
---- {{find sources|{{{page|}}}}}
{{automated tools}}
{{last edited by}} ----
}} {{#ifexpr:{{HoursElapsed|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP}}}}>8760 |}}{{#ifeq:{{Yesno-yes|{{{help|{{{newuser|{{{noob|{{{afc|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|no|| {{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|Finished writing a draft article? Are you ready to request an experienced editor review it for possible inclusion in Wikipedia? {{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|    {{Clickable button|Submit your draft for review!|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=style=line-height: 1.6em; padding: 0.1em 1.6em 0.1em 1.6em}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes||{{DMC|Userspace drafts|from|{{#switch:{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}}}}|2001|2002|2003|2004|2005|2006=before 2007|2007=2007|#default={{{date|}}}}}}}}} |#default= }}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Stale userspace drafts]] [[Category:Misplaced userspace drafts]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{#switch:{{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes |User |{{NAMESPACE}} }} |User |Wikipedia talk |User talk={{ombox |subst = {{subst:substcheck}} |type = notice |image = [[File:Under construction icon-blue.svg|none|50px|link=]] |text = '''This is not a Wikipedia {{{article|article}}}''': It is an individual user's '''work-in-progress''' page, and may be incomplete and/or unreliable.{{#if:{{{page|}}} |{{space}}The current/final version of this {{#if:{{{article|}}}|page|article}} may be located at [[{{{page}}}]] now or in the future.}}{{#if:{{{newuser|}}}{{{noob|}}}{{{help|}}} | |{{space}}For guidance on developing this draft, see [[Wikipedia:So you made a userspace draft]]. }}{{nbsp}}{{{extra|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{help|}}}|no||
---- {{find sources|{{{page|}}}}}
{{automated tools}}
{{last edited by}} ----
}} {{#ifexpr:{{HoursElapsed|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP}}}}>8760 |}}{{#ifeq:{{Yesno-yes|{{{help|{{{newuser|{{{noob|{{{afc|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|no|| {{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|Finished writing a draft article? Are you ready to request an experienced editor review it for possible inclusion in Wikipedia? {{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|    {{Clickable button|Submit your draft for review!|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=style=line-height: 1.6em; padding: 0.1em 1.6em 0.1em 1.6em}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes||{{DMC|Userspace drafts|from|{{#switch:{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}}}}|2001|2002|2003|2004|2005|2006=before 2007|2007=2007|#default={{{date|}}}}}}}}} |#default= }}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Stale userspace drafts]] [[Category:Misplaced userspace drafts]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{#switch:{{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes |User |{{NAMESPACE}} }} |User |Wikipedia talk |User talk={{ombox |subst = {{subst:substcheck}} |type = notice |image = [[File:Under construction icon-blue.svg|none|50px|link=]] |text = '''This is not a Wikipedia {{{article|article}}}''': It is an individual user's '''work-in-progress''' page, and may be incomplete and/or unreliable.{{#if:{{{page|}}} |{{space}}The current/final version of this {{#if:{{{article|}}}|page|article}} may be located at [[{{{page}}}]] now or in the future.}}{{#if:{{{newuser|}}}{{{noob|}}}{{{help|}}} | |{{space}}For guidance on developing this draft, see [[Wikipedia:So you made a userspace draft]]. }}{{nbsp}}{{{extra|}}}{{#ifeq:{{{help|}}}|no||
---- {{find sources|{{{page|}}}}}
{{automated tools}}
{{last edited by}} ----
}} {{#ifexpr:{{HoursElapsed|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP}}}}>8760 |}}{{#ifeq:{{Yesno-yes|{{{help|{{{newuser|{{{noob|{{{afc|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|no|| {{#invoke:AfC submission catcheck|submitted|This draft has been submitted and is currently awaiting review.|Finished writing a draft article? Are you ready to request an experienced editor review it for possible inclusion in Wikipedia? {{#if:{{REVISIONID}}0|    {{Clickable button|Submit your draft for review!|url={{fullurl:Wikipedia:Articles_for_creation/Submitting|withJS=MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|class=mw-ui-progressive|style=style=line-height: 1.6em; padding: 0.1em 1.6em 0.1em 1.6em}}|Save your work by pressing the "{{int:Publishpage}}" button below, and a button will appear here allowing you to submit your draft for review.}}}}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{demo|yes}}}|yes||{{DMC|Userspace drafts|from|{{#switch:{{#time:Y|{{{date|}}}}}|2001|2002|2003|2004|2005|2006=before 2007|2007=2007|#default={{{date|}}}}}}}}} |#default= }}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Stale userspace drafts]] [[Category:Misplaced userspace drafts]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
